title: Wave Coordination
content: A wave is a coordinated set of attacks performed by multiple kingdom members against selected targets at a planned time. Good waves require updated intel, target assignments, and timing.

title: Chain Strategy
content: A chain is a coordinated attack plan focused on reducing one enemy province through repeated attacks. Used to remove enemy strength and control the battlefield.

title: Target Selection Strategy
content: Targets should be selected using updated intelligence including networth, defense, offense, race, personality, and province role.

title: Intel Checklist
content: Before attacking, gather Spy on Throne, Spy on Military, and Survey information to understand the target province.

title: Defense Evaluation
content: Evaluate enemy defense values, military composition, and bonuses before committing attacks.

title: Offense Evaluation
content: Evaluate available offense, offensive units, and attack requirements before selecting targets.

title: Thievery Role
content: Thieves provide intelligence and sabotage support. Effective thievery weakens targets before attacks.

title: Magic Role
content: Magic supports kingdoms through offense, defense, economy, and battlefield control. Spell timing is important during wars.

title: Province Recovery
content: After attacks, provinces recover through rebuilding, population growth, economy management, and defensive actions.

title: War Preparation
content: Successful wars require organized roles, updated intel, attack plans, and communication between kingdom members.

title: Hostile Progression
content: Hostile progression describes increasing conflict between kingdoms through actions that raise relations toward war.

title: War Declaration
content: War begins when kingdoms reach the required conditions for conflict. War changes available actions and strategy.
